Name: AdministrativeGender
Title: AdministrativeGender
Description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

Name: AllLanguages
Title: All Languages
Description: This value set includes all possible codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: IdentifierTypeCodes
Title: Identifier Type Codes
Description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

Name: IdentifierUse
Title: IdentifierUse
Description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: LinkType
Title: Link Type
Description: The type of link between this Patient resource and another Patient/RelatedPerson resource.

Name: MaritalStatusCodes
Title: Marital Status Codes
Description: This value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate the marital status of a person.

Name: PatientContactRelationship
Title: Patient Contact Relationship
Description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.
